title: Kindness Comes Back Around
lesson: A small act of kindness returns to you when you least expect it.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a bright suburban neighbourhood on a sunny morning, walking along a tree-lined pavement. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible. Warm natural sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A scene on the same sunny pavement. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left in the mid-ground, facing the camera with their face clearly visible and a concerned expression. In the right foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} has dropped a torn paper grocery bag, oranges rolling across the ground. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is on the far left, kneeling but with the head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, gathering oranges back into the torn bag. {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} stands to the right with both hands clasped, watching gratefully. Same sunny pavement, soft warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks on the far left carrying two grocery bags, facing the camera with a kind smile and the face fully visible. {GENDER_F_AGE_70_RACE_ASIAN} walks beside them on the right, gesturing toward a small house with a blue door. Late-morning sunlight, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image alone at a roadside bus stop during sudden rain, with no umbrella, hunching slightly but facing the camera so the face remains clearly visible. Overcast grey light, rain streaks, reflective wet pavement, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At the same rainy bus stop, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with a surprised, grateful expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_25_RACE_ASIAN} holds a large umbrella over both of them and smiles warmly. Soft rain with warm light breaking through the clouds, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: One sunny morning, you set off down the street. The birds were singing, and you felt happy.
Up ahead, an old lady's bag tore open and oranges rolled everywhere. "Oh no!" you said.
You knelt down and helped pick up every single orange. "Thank you, dear," the old lady smiled.
You carried her heavy bags all the way home. "You are so kind," she said warmly.
A few days later, rain poured down at the bus stop. You had no umbrella and got cold and wet.
Then a kind young man held his umbrella over you. "Stay dry!" he smiled. Your kindness had come back to you.
